title: ageratina arsenei
intro: Ageratina arsenei, also known as Arsène's ageratina, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ageratina arsenei include the potential relief from pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ageratina arsenei can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, which are popular methods for harnessing its medicinal properties.
